conversation.message: How have you been feeling lately, overall?
I have been really tired. I used to be able to get up and go, but now I just feel like I am dragging myself through the day.
How long has it been since you felt like you could get up and go?
It's been a few years now. I used to work full-time, but I had to stop because I just couldn't keep up.
Is it harder to focus or concentrate than it used to be?
Yes. I sit down to watch TV, and I can't even follow the plot. I just find myself staring at the screen, but I don't know what's going on.
How long has it been since you could comfortably follow a TV show?
Months. It used to be my favorite thing to do, but now I can't even stay awake long enough to finish an episode.
How have you been sleeping lately?
I don't sleep much. I wake up a lot during the night, and when I do, I just lie there.
When you wake up during the night, what kinds of thoughts or feelings come to mind?
Just worries, mostly. I lie there thinking about bills and money, and I just can't seem to shut my brain off.
Been doing anything you enjoy lately?
Not really. I used to love gardening, but I haven't been able to get out there in months. I miss it, but I just don't have the energy.
What's been making it hard to find the energy for things like gardening?
I don't know. I used to be so active, but now I just feel like I am running on empty all the time.
When you think about the next few weeks, what do you expect day to day?
Just more of the same, I suppose. I will probably just sit around the house, trying to find the energy to do something, but mostly just feeling tired.
What kinds of things do you wish you had the energy for?
Just normal things. I look at my friends on Facebook, and they are all out doing things, and I just feel so left out.
Do you find it harder to make decisions than before, even small ones?
Yes, it is really hard. I look at a menu, and there are just so many options, and I can't seem to decide on anything.
How long does it usually take you to finally choose something from the menu?
A long time. I usually end up just ordering the same thing every time because it is the easiest option.
Do you feel like you have enough energy for your usual day?
No. I used to be able to get everything done, but now I just feel like I am barely keeping my head above water.
How long has it felt like you're just barely keeping up?
Years. It feels like I've been running on empty for years, just going through the motions.
Are you still into the things you used to care about?
I used to love reading, but I haven't picked up a book in months. I just don't have the energy to focus on anything anymore.
Can you tell me more about that feeling of not having the energy to focus?
It's just like my brain is foggy. I look at a page, and the words just blur together, and I can't seem to make sense of anything.
Is there anything weighing on your mind that you wish you could change?
My husband. He passed away a few years ago, and I wish I could turn back time and be there for him.
Do you feel like you could have done something differently back then?
Yes. I regret not telling him how much I loved him more often.
How do you feel about how things have gone for you recently?
Sad. I miss him so much, and I just wish I could turn back time and be the wife he deserved.
What do you wish you had done differently as a wife?
Just that I had been more present for him. I was so busy working, and I didn't appreciate him enough when he was still here.
How's your appetite been?
It's terrible. I used to love cooking, but now I just can't seem to eat much of anything.
Has your enjoyment of cooking changed along with your appetite?
Yes, completely. I used to love making dinner for my family, but now I just can't be bothered to stand in the kitchen.
Have you found yourself getting emotional more easily lately?
Yes, a lot. I cry a lot, mostly at night, just thinking about him and how much I miss him.
